items.summary: Update the SiteHeader component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) to reduce the horizontal spacing/gap between navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) so they appear closer together and less spread out, without changing the header structure, logo, link labels, destinations, font sizes, colors, active link highlighting, or hover effects.

Update the HomePage component (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) "See MORSHID in Action" videos section to add two new embedded YouTube videos for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58 alongside the existing videos, and ensure all videos (existing + new) are rendered at the same size and are visually aligned, without changing any other page sections, copy, images, or layout.
